catalysts.catalyst_details: Intuit's stock was indicated -4% after 2QFY26 results beat expectations, but 3Q EPS guidance was 4% below the Street's estimates. Revenue was 2.6% above, operating margin ~250bps ahead, and EPS 13% above. FY26 guidance remained unchanged.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: INTU is indicated -4% post 2QFY26 results that beat, but 3Q EPS guidance that is below the Street: Revenue was 2.6% above, operating margin was ~250bps ahead, and EPS 13% above (FactSet). FY26 guidance is unchanged (typically unchanged until 3Q when tax season is over) and 3Q revenue guidance is in line with the Street, but 3Q EPS was guided 4% below.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Intuit is leveraging AI to drive better customer experience, emphasizing domain expertise, a platform approach, and regulation/financial risk as moats. Their platform uses proprietary data, network effects, domain-specific AI, and AI-powered human intelligence.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Intuit directly addressed the ongoing market debate around its terminal value and detailed several ways it is leveraging AI to drive better customer experience. Intuit underscored domain expertise, their platform approach, and regulation/financial risk as moats. Intuit’s platform leverages proprietary data, network effects (100m+ customers), domain-specific AI capabilities, and AI-powered human intelligence - with the key vision being AI and human intelligence working together.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Analysts are positive on QuickBooks, believing Intuit can combine its data/LLMs, third-party models, and understanding of small business owners to design AI agents that SMBs will adopt.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: In this context, we lean more positive on QuickBooks: we think Intuit should be able to marry their own data/LLMs, 3P models where necessary (e.g., a weather engine from Anthropic), and a deep understanding of how small business owners think/approach workflows to design agents that SMBs will actually adopt.

catalysts.catalyst_topic: Capturing Share in Assisted Tax Segment
catalysts.catalyst_details: Intuit's key opportunity in the Tax segment is to capture more accretive share in the Assisted segment, especially at the high end where they can offer a better experience and benefit from demographic shifts.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: In Tax, we believe the key will be to what extent Intuit can capture more accretive share in Assisted while managing competitive risks at the low end. At the high end, we believe Intuit can offer a better experience than peers at better unit economics, and will likely benefit from demographic shifts.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Analysts are less constructive on the low-end Tax segment due to signs of new competition, consumer distribution of LLMs, and consumers placing less weight on security/privacy risks.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: We lean less constructive at the low end, as we believe there are already signs of new competition, LLMs already have consumer distribution, and our 10+ years covering cybersecurity suggest that consumers generally place less weight on security/privacy risks (although this will likely vary by customer cohort).

catalysts.catalyst_topic: AI Agent Adoption and Repeat Engagement
catalysts.catalyst_details: 3 million customers have used Intuit's AI agents with an 85% repeat engagement rate, representing a 3% uptake rate of their 100m+ customer base. Growing this adoption is crucial for long-term value.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Agent adoption: 3 mn customers have leveraged agents to do work for them, with an 85% repeat engagement rate. Against their 100m+ customer base (some of which is likely lower frequency/less addressible), this implies a 3% uptake rate; growing this over time will be key to establishing Intuit as the starting place for customers to access agents and lower the risk of long-term value abstraction.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Management highlighted new AI-enabled QBO features such as auto reconciliation, routing, and weather integration, some leveraging outside LLMs, designed to save business owners time.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Management noted new AI-enabled QBO features like auto reconciliation, routing, and weather, some of which leverage outside LLMs, to save business owners time.

catalysts.catalyst_details: On the tax side, 80% of customers use automated data entry, and a new cost basis agent lowers taxable income by $12,000.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: On the tax side, 80% of customers are using automated data entry and their new cost basis agent lowers taxable income by $12,000.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Credit Karma introduced Refund, Debt, and Tax Assistants for 'done-for-you' experiences, and Cards Optimizer and Credit Spark to boost year-round engagement.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Credit Karma’s Refund, Debt, and Tax Assistants aim to deliver done-for-you experiences, while Cards Optimizer and Credit Spark aim to promote engagement throughout the year.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Intuit is expanding its mid-market sales capacity by nearly 30% due to attractive unit economics, with QBO Advanced and IES growing 40%.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Intuit continues to see attractive unit economics and are expanding their mid-market sales capacity by nearly 30%. QBO Advanced and IES grew 40%.

catalysts.catalyst_details: Intuit signed partnerships with several top 20 accounting firms in 2Q, and new wholesale billing capabilities helped drive 1/3 of new contracts influenced by accountant recommendations in 2Q, up from ~20% in 1Q.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Intuit signed partnerships with several top 20 accounting firms in 2Q, which coupled with new wholesale billing capabilites drove 1/3 of new contracts influence by accountant recommendations in 2Q vs. ~20% in 1Q.

catalysts.catalyst_topic: Tax Season Industry Growth and Assisted Penetration
catalysts.catalyst_details: Initial expectations for strong industry return growth and Assisted penetration due to the OBBBA were tempered by channel checks suggesting a more gradual impact. Through Feb 6th, IRS returns were -5% y/y, while TurboTax revenue was +12% y/y, with strong assisted growth and Credit Karma driving accelerating tax growth.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: At the start of the year we had expected strong industry return growth and Assisted penetration due to the effects of the OBBBA, but our channel checks suggested the impact would be more gradual. Through Feb 6th, IRS returns were -5% y/y while TT revenue was +12% y/y; we expect to get more granular data at the Investor Day but management noted assisted was strong and CK continues to drive accelerating tax growth.

catalysts.catalyst_details: TurboTax saw 5.1 million unique visitors to landing pages through Feb 6th, compared to 4.2 million in 2025, mostly prior year assisted prospects.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: TT has seen 5.1mn unique visitors to landing pages through 2/6 vs. 4.2mn in 2025, most of which are prior year assisted prospects.

catalysts.catalyst_details: A key risk identified is the impact of AI on the tax and accounting industries, which could affect Intuit's core business.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Key risks: AI impact on tax/accounting; health of SMBs.

catalysts.catalyst_details: The health of Small and Medium Businesses (SMBs) is identified as a key risk, as Intuit's products heavily cater to this market.
catalysts.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Key risks: AI impact on tax/accounting; health of SMBs.

file_Id: Intuit Inc. (INTU)_ Agent adoption and continued tax share gain will be key to proving out the moat.pdf
